title: Asian Paints Signature Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Asian Paints Signature Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!
